title: Publish
description: Generate and deploy your static site

overview.title: Overview
overview.quickActionsDescription: Generate and deploy your site in a few clicks

build.title: Build
build.description: Generate the static site from your data

targets.webDescription: HTML pages with navigation, maps and visualizations

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.propagationDelay: The site may take a few moments to become available.
deploy.noBuild: You need to generate the site first before deploying.
deploy.cliOnly: This deployment is currently only available via command line.
deploy.staleWarning: The exported site is outdated. Data has changed since the last build.

platforms.title: Deployment Platform
platforms.description: Choose where to deploy your site
platforms.cloudflareDescription: Global edge network with automatic HTTPS. Free plan: 100,000 requests/day.
platforms.cloudflarePrerequisites: Create a Cloudflare account. Get your Account ID from the dashboard.
platforms.cloudflareTokenHint: Create a token with Workers Scripts: Edit permission. Use the 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' template.
platforms.githubDescription: Free and unlimited static site hosting. Files are pushed to a dedicated branch (gh-pages) of your repository.
platforms.githubPrerequisites: Create a GitHub repository (can be empty). Generate a Fine-Grained Token with Contents: Read & Write permissions on that repository.
platforms.githubTokenHint: Go to Settings > Developer settings > Fine-grained tokens. Select the target repository and grant Contents: Read and write.
platforms.netlifyDescription: Global CDN with instant deployment, automatic HTTPS, and branch previews. Generous free plan.
platforms.netlifyPrerequisites: Create a site on Netlify (or let the deployment create one). Generate a Personal Access Token.
platforms.netlifyTokenHint: User Settings > Applications > Personal access tokens > New access token.
platforms.vercelDescription: Instant deployment on Vercel's edge network with automatic previews. Free Hobby plan.
platforms.vercelPrerequisites: Create a Vercel account. The project will be created automatically on first deployment.
platforms.vercelTokenHint: Account Settings > Tokens > Create Token. Scope: Full Account.
platforms.renderDescription: Free static sites with automatic HTTPS. Two methods: Deploy Hook (simple) or API Key (advanced).
platforms.renderPrerequisites: Create a Static Site on Render. Use a Deploy Hook for the simplest method.
platforms.renderTokenHint: Account Settings > API Keys. Only needed if you're not using Deploy Hook.
platforms.sshDescription: Direct deployment to your server via SSH and rsync. Full control, no third-party dependency.
platforms.sshPrerequisites: SSH access to the server must be configured. rsync must be installed on the server.

cloudflare.accountIdHint: Found on the Cloudflare dashboard, bottom-right of your domain's overview page, or in the URL bar.
cloudflare.apiTokenHint: Create a token with Workers Scripts: Edit permission. Use the 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' template.
cloudflare.projectNameHint: Unique name for your site. Will be accessible at project.pages.dev.
cloudflare.branchHint: Optional. Creates a branch.project.pages.dev alias for preview.

github.tokenHint: Go to Settings > Developer settings > Fine-grained tokens. Select the target repository and grant Contents: Read and write.
github.repoHint: Format: owner/repo. E.g.: my-org/my-site. The repository must exist on GitHub.
github.branchHint: Default: gh-pages. After first deployment, enable GitHub Pages in the repository's Settings > Pages.

netlify.tokenHint: User Settings > Applications > Personal access tokens > New access token.
netlify.siteIdHint: Found in Site configuration > General > Site ID. Format: abc123-def456-...

vercel.tokenHint: Account Settings > Tokens > Create Token. Scope: Full Account.
vercel.projectNameHint: The project will be created automatically if it doesn't exist. Will be accessible at project.vercel.app.

render.deployHookUrlHint: Dashboard > Static Site > Settings > Deploy Hook. Copy the full URL.
render.tokenHint: Account Settings > API Keys. Only needed if you're not using Deploy Hook.
render.serviceIdHint: Found in the dashboard URL: dashboard.render.com/static/srv-xxx. Starts with srv-.

ssh.hostHint: Format: user@server.com or just server.com (will use the current user).
ssh.pathHint: Absolute path to the web directory on the server. E.g.: /var/www/html/my-site
ssh.portHint: Default: 22. Change if your SSH server uses a different port.
ssh.keyPathHint: Path to your SSH private key. Default: ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 or ~/.ssh/id_rsa.

config.projectNameHint: The project will be created automatically if it doesn't exist
config.branchHint: Specifying a branch creates an alias (branch.project.pages.dev)

dashboard.deleteConfirmDescription: Do you want to delete the {{platform}} configuration? The deployed site will not be affected.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Configure a platform to publish your site online
dashboard.unpublishConfirmDescription: The {{platform}} site will be removed from the platform. Local configuration will be kept.
dashboard.unpublishDelay: The site may remain accessible for a few minutes due to CDN caching.
dashboard.unpublishNotSupported: Unpublishing is not supported for this platform

history.title: History
history.confirmClearBuilds: Are you sure you want to clear build history? This action cannot be undone.
history.confirmClearDeploys: Are you sure you want to clear deployment history? This action cannot be undone.
